LanguageData.Ammo_30mmRifleGrenade_HE.label: 30mm rifle grenade (HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_30mmRifleGrenade_HE.description: A small, low velocity rifle grenade propelled with a blank cartridge.
LanguageData.Ammo_30mmRifleGrenade_EMP.label: 30mm rifle grenade (EMP)
LanguageData.Ammo_30mmRifleGrenade_EMP.description: A small, low velocity rifle grenade propelled with a blank cartridge.
LanguageData.Ammo_30mmRifleGrenade_Smoke.label: 30mm riflegrenade (Smoke)
LanguageData.Ammo_30mmRifleGrenade_Smoke.description: A small, low velocity rifle grenade propelled with a blank cartridge.
LanguageData.Bullet_30mmRifleGrenade_HE.label: 30mm riflegrenade (HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_30mmRifleGrenade_EMP.label: 30mm riflegrenade (EMP)
LanguageData.Bullet_30mmRifleGrenade_Smoke.label: 30mm riflegrenade (Smoke)
